2606.24745.title: Beyond U-Net: A Latent-Representation-Aligned Skip-Free Backbone for Flow-Matching Speech Enhancement
2606.24745.paper_summary: Generative models, particularly diffusion and score-based approaches, have recently achieved strong performance in speech enhancement, but their iterative sampling process limits real-time deployment. Flow Matching offers an efficient alternative by transporting noisy speech toward clean speech through an ordinary differential equation with few function evaluations. In this work, we propose a skip-free encoder-decoder backbone for flow-matching speech enhancement, guided by Latent Representation Alignment (LRA). Instead of relying on U-Net skip connections, which may transfer noise-correlated low-level features to the decoder, the proposed model aligns its bottleneck and decoder representations with clean latent features extracted from a frozen Descript Audio Codec encoder-decoder without quantization. This codec-aligned supervision promotes compact clean-speech representations while preserving efficient few-step inference. Experiments on WSJ0-CHiME3 and VoiceBank-DEMAND show improved PESQ and perceptual quality, especially on VoiceBank-DEMAND, using only five function evaluations.
2606.24745.paper_summary_zh: 生成模型，特別是擴散和基於分數的方法，最近在語音增強方面取得了良好的表現，但它們的迭代取樣過程限制了實時部署。流匹配提供了一種高效的替代方案，通過一個普通微分方程將噪聲語音轉換為清晰語音，並且只需少量函數評估。在這項工作中，我們提出了一種無跳躍的編碼器-解碼器骨幹，專為流匹配語音增強而設計，並由潛在表示對齊（LRA）指導。該模型不依賴於U-Net的跳躍連接，因為這可能會將與噪聲相關的低層特徵轉移到解碼器，而是將其瓶頸和解碼器表示與從凍結的Descript音頻編解碼器中提取的清晰潛在特徵對齊，且無需量化。這種編解碼器對齊的監督促進了緊湊的清晰語音表示，同時保留了高效的少步推斷。在WSJ0-CHiME3和VoiceBank-DEMAND上的實驗顯示，使用僅五次函數評估的情況下，PESQ和感知質量均有所改善，尤其是在VoiceBank-DEMAND上。
2606.24745.author: Wangyi Pu et.al.
